overall.description: A first-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character leaving a roadside industrial area, climbing a desert hillside overlooking Night City at sunset, enjoying the panoramic view of the neon-lit skyline and ferris wheel, then descending back to a graffiti-covered roadside with an abandoned car. The footage transitions from industrial outskirts to natural desert terrain to urban vista.

events.description: character leaves paved road and begins ascending dirt embankment
transition from level walking to steep uphill climbing

agents.ego_description: moving from the roadside past the industrial building and beginning to climb the steep dirt slope

entered.detail: large multi-story building under construction with exposed scaffolding and framework
thick electrical cables stretching across the road overhead
asphalt road with double yellow lines curving along the industrial zone
metal guardrail with red warning lights mounted on posts
steep sandy slope leading up from the roadside to the hilltop

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a paved road beside a large industrial building under construction. The character leaves the road and begins climbing a steep dirt embankment, with power lines overhead and a guardrail with warning lights visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert hillside with sparse scrub vegetation

events.description: terrain becomes rockier with scattered desert bushes and shrubs appearing

agents.ego_description: continuing the ascent up the rocky hillside path, moving parallel to the guardrail with warning lights

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock formations and boulders scattered across the hillside
sparse low-lying bushes and dry vegetation dotting the sandy terrain
faint orange and yellow lights from the city becoming visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the open desert hillside, leaving the industrial area behind. The terrain shifts to rocky outcrops and sparse scrub vegetation as the guardrail recedes into the distance and the glow of the distant city becomes visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert ridge overlook with panoramic cyberpunk city view

events.description: Night City skyline with illuminated ferris wheel and skyscrapers comes into full panoramic view
camera moves through cluster of yucca plants temporarily obscuring the city view

agents.ego_description: moving along the ridge line and panning across the stunning cityscape, taking in the illuminated ferris wheel and towering skyscrapers

entered.detail: spiky desert yucca plants with sword-like leaves in the immediate foreground
large illuminated ferris wheel with purple and pink neon lighting
tall dark skyscraper with illuminated '07' signage near the top
dense cluster of high-rise buildings with numerous lit windows and neon signs
bright holographic advertisements and digital billboards glowing in the distance

segments.scene_description: Reaching the ridge top, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of Night City at dusk. The character moves along the overlook, passing yucca plants, with the glowing ferris wheel and towering skyscrapers dominating the skyline. The city lights create a stark contrast against the warm orange sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside return with graffiti barriers and abandoned vehicle

events.description: descends from ridge back to roadside area with concrete walls covered in graffiti
approaches abandoned car parked on the roadside shoulder

agents.ego_description: moving back down from the vista toward the road, passing through vegetation and approaching an abandoned vehicle

notable_agents.action: abandoned car parked on the roadside shoulder with doors open

entered.detail: long concrete barrier covered in colorful spray paint and street art
asphalt road returning to the foreground as the descent completes
derelict vehicle parked on the shoulder with visible damage and open doors
low concrete wall lining the edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the ridge back to the roadside, passing through yucca plants and graffiti-covered concrete walls. The city view fades behind as the camera approaches an abandoned car parked on the road shoulder, returning to the industrial roadside environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty industrial roadside up a desert ridge to a panoramic urban vista and back again. It begins on a paved road beside a building under construction, moving away from the asphalt to climb a steep dirt embankment beneath overhead power lines. As the character traverses the open hillside, the terrain shifts into rocky outcrops and sparse scrub vegetation while the industrial area recedes and the distant glow of the city emerges on the horizon. The scene then opens at the ridge top to a breathtaking panoramic view of Night City at dusk, where towering skyscrapers and a glowing ferris wheel contrast against a warm orange sunset sky. Finally, the camera descends through yucca plants and past graffiti-covered concrete walls, leaving the skyline behind to return to the roadside environment beside an abandoned car.
